name: Butterbur
summary: Butterbur is a sesquiterpene-rich herb usually discussed around standardized root extracts.
description: Butterbur is a sesquiterpene-rich herb usually discussed around standardized root extracts. Petasin and isopetasin are the anchor constituents most often linked to migraine and allergic-rhinitis relevance.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
interactions: Caution with hepatotoxic drugs/supplements and enzyme-inducing medicines
